tasks.label: Build and Deploy Pico (Release)
tasks.command: cmake -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DPICO_BOARD=pico && cmake --build build -j && mkdir -p Releases && cp build/altair.uf2 Releases/altair_pico.uf2 && echo '\n🔄 Rebooting Pico into BOOTSEL mode...' && picotool reboot -f -u && sleep 2 && echo '📤 Uploading firmware...' && picotool load -x build/altair.uf2 -f && echo '✅ Firmware deployed and running!'

tasks.label: Build and Deploy Pico W & Remote FS (Release)
tasks.command: cmake -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DPICO_BOARD=pico_w -DREMOTE_FS_SUPPORT=ON && cmake --build build -j && mkdir -p Releases && cp build/altair.uf2 Releases/altair_pico_w.uf2 && echo '\n🔄 Rebooting Pico into BOOTSEL mode...' && picotool reboot -f -u && sleep 2 && echo '📤 Uploading firmware...' && picotool load -x build/altair.uf2 -f && echo '✅ Firmware deployed and running!'
